Document:
# Two-Handed Melee
Two-handed melee weapons are slower to swing but deal significantly more damage. They require both hands to use, meaning you cannot hold a firearm at the same time — but in melee range, their power is unmatched.
## Spears
Spears are versatile two-handed weapons with reach. They can be thrown and deal good damage against armored and unarmored targets alike.
## Hammers & Sledges
Blunt force weapons that crush through armor. The Super Sledge is the pinnacle of two-handed blunt weaponry.
## Long Blades
Large swords and blades for those who prefer cutting over crushing. Many are tribal or ceremonial in origin.
